warnings: Exchange Netflow and Exchange Balance currently use approximation proxies.
Some snapshot-style metrics build their sparkline history locally from repeated cache refreshes.
LTH-NUPL and STH-NUPL are currently derived from public cohort MVRV series.

exchange-netflow.deltaLabel: STH supply day-over-day proxy for exchange flow

exchange-balance.deltaLabel: STH supply proxy for exchange-ready BTC

percent-supply-in-profit.deltaLabel: Percent of BTC supply currently in profit

lth-net-position-change.deltaLabel: Derived 30D change in long-term holder supply

mayer-multiple.deltaLabel: BTC spot divided by 200D moving average

hodl-waves.deltaLabel: Share of supply dormant for 1 year or more

active-supply.deltaLabel: Estimated BTC transfer volume / circulating supply

dormancy.deltaLabel: Derived from days destroyed / BTC sent

stock-to-flow.deltaLabel: Circulating supply divided by trailing 1Y issuance

spot-btc-etf-holdings.deltaLabel: Total BTC held by spot ETFs
